label: IR Receiver Breakout
description:
Description: This is a very small infrared receiver based on the TSOP85 receiver from Vishay. This receiver has all the filtering and 38kHz demodulation built into the unit. Simply point a IR remote at the receiver, hit a button, and you'll see a stream of 1s and 0s out of the data pin.

Documents:

  • Datasheet
  • Schematic
  • Consumer IR Information
